productName: SF FIR JF - 1G - Lemon Cherry Gelato - Citrus - IND - CR
description: A grab-and-go hybrid disposable of Lemon Cherry Gelato, the simplest way to vape: flavorful, portable, and zero setup required. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of lemon, citrus, and berry, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
